steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says Kershaw et al.'s research "reconciles two competing theories," providing "firm details" in a previously ______ area of study. The blank must describe what the field was like before those firm details arrived — a field defined by competing, unresolved theories rather than established facts.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — esoteric: means known only to a few specialists — the passage says nothing about the field being obscure or exclusive. ✗
  • Choice B — authoritative: means commanding and well-established — the opposite of a field defined by competing, unresolved theories. ✗
  • Choice C — solitary: means alone or isolated — does not describe an unsettled field with competing ideas. ✗
  • Choice D — speculative: means based on conjecture rather than proven knowledge — exactly describes a field where two competing theories existed without resolution. ✓
D is correct.
